controls.control_objective: To ensure 1994 with reference to their demand and time liabilities (dtl)
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI), recognizing the
imperative of robust risk management, therefore introduced prudential exposure limits for
Urban Co-operative Banks (UCBs) in May 1994 with reference to their demand and time
liabilities (DTL).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 1994 with reference to their demand and time liabilities (dtl)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks: concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks:
Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks: concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as a 'ucb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as a 'UCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as a 'ucb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
In this context, urban co-operative banks shall mean Primary Co-operative Banks as
defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear the
meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure include funded and non-funded credit limits and underwriting and similar commitments
controls.control_description:
<image>
(1) "Credit Exposure" shall include funded and non-funded credit limits and
underwriting and similar commitments;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include funded and non-funded credit limits and underwriting and similar commitments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be clean bills
controls.control_description:
Note: All bills of exchange not accompanied by the official receipts of the Indian
Railways or Indian Airlines Corporation or Road and Water Transport Operators
shall be deemed to be clean bills.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be clean bills

controls.control_objective: To ensure include any person who is co-parcener or who desires to stand surety for a borrowing member of the bank or who desires to borrow occasionally for a te
controls.control_description:
(7) "Nominal member" shall include any person who is co-parcener or who desires to
stand surety for a borrowing member of the bank or who desires to borrow occasionally
for a temporary period (i) for purchase of consumer durables, (ii) against certain tangible
securities such as gold and silver ornaments, fixed deposit receipts, life insurance policies,
government and other securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include any person who is co-parcener or who desires to stand surety for a borrowing member of the bank or who desires to borrow occasionally for a te

controls.control_objective: To ensure be enrolled as a nominal member upon his application in a prescribed form on payment of nominal fees as non-refundable entrance fee provided he reside
controls.control_description:
Such person may be enrolled as a nominal member
upon his application in a prescribed form on payment of nominal fees as non-refundable
entrance fee provided he resides or is gainfully engaged in any occupation within the area
of operation of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be enrolled as a nominal member upon his application in a prescribed form on payment of nominal fees as non-refundable entrance fee provided he reside

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible and as such shall not be admitted to nominal membership
controls.control_description:
A co-operative society registered under any law shall not be
eligible and as such shall not be admitted to nominal membership.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible and as such shall not be admitted to nominal membership

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entitled to receive a share certificate, audited accounts, annual report and dividend
controls.control_description:
The nominal member
shall not be entitled to receive a share certificate, audited accounts, annual report and
dividend.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be entitled to receive a share certificate, audited accounts, annual report and dividend

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entitled to attend, participate and vote in the general meeting and/or special general meeting of the bank
controls.control_description:
The nominal member shall not be entitled to attend, participate and vote in the
General Meeting and/or Special General Meeting of the Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entitled to attend, participate and vote in the general meeting and/or special general meeting of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at credit exposure limit
controls.control_description:
(i) The sanctioned limit or outstanding whichever is higher shall be reckoned for
arriving at credit exposure limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be reckoned for arriving at credit exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the outstanding for arriving at credit exposure limit
controls.control_description:
Further, in case of fully drawn term loans, where
there is no scope of re-drawal of any portion of the sanctioned limit, a UCB may
reckon the outstanding for arriving at credit exposure limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to reckon the outstanding for arriving at credit exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by single borrower / group exposure
controls.control_description:
(iii) The level of an individual UCB's share in Consortium / Multiple Banking /
Syndication shall be governed by single borrower / group exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by single borrower / group exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure include loans and advances granted against the security of a ucb's own term deposits
controls.control_description:
(iv) Credit exposure shall not include loans and advances granted against the security
of a UCB's own term deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include loans and advances granted against the security of a ucb's own term deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the same as prescribed by provisions contained at reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - classification, valuation and operation of inve
controls.control_description:
(2) "Investment Exposure (Non-SLR securities)" shall be the same as prescribed by
provisions contained at Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks -
Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the same as prescribed by provisions contained at reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - classification, valuation and operation of inve

controls.control_objective: To ensure include both credit exposure (loans and advances) and investment exposure (non-slr securities) as indicated in paragraphs 4(1) and 4(2)
controls.control_description:
(3) "Exposure" shall include both credit exposure (Loans and Advances) and
investment exposure (Non-SLR securities) as indicated in paragraphs 4(1) and 4(2).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include both credit exposure (loans and advances) and investment exposure (non-slr securities) as indicated in paragraphs 4(1) and 4(2)

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, be decided by the ucb on the basis of relevant information available with it, the guiding principle in this regard being commonality of m
controls.control_description:
The group to which
a particular borrowing unit belongs may, therefore, be decided by the UCB on the
basis of relevant information available with it, the guiding principle in this regard
being commonality of management and effective control.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, be decided by the ucb on the basis of relevant information available with it, the guiding principle in this regard being commonality of m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be connected group and units coming under common ownership shall be deemed to be a single party
controls.control_description:
shall be deemed to
be connected group and units coming under common ownership shall be deemed
to be a single party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be connected group and units coming under common ownership shall be deemed to be a single party

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the purpose of fixing the exposure limits
controls.control_description:
(5) "Tier-I Capital" as on March 31 of the preceding financial year shall be reckoned for
the purpose of fixing the exposure limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the purpose of fixing the exposure limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the same <image> as that prescribed in reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Tier-I capital for the purpose shall be the same
<image>
as that prescribed in Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the same <image> as that prescribed in reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure include clean overdrafts, loans against personal security, clean bills or multani hundies purchased or discounted, cheques purchased and drawals allow
controls.control_description:
(6) "Unsecured advances" shall include clean overdrafts, loans against personal
security, clean bills or Multani hundies purchased or discounted, cheques purchased and
drawals allowed against cheques sent for collection but shall exclude:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include clean overdrafts, loans against personal security, clean bills or multani hundies purchased or discounted, cheques purchased and drawals allow

controls.control_objective: To ensure the co-operative societies act of the state concerned contains an obligatory provision for deduction of periodical loan instalments by the employer ou
controls.control_description:
(vi) advances granted to salaried employees against personal security,
Provided that the Co-operative Societies Act of the State concerned contains an
obligatory provision for deduction of periodical loan instalments by the employer out
of the employee's salary / wages to meet the UCB's claims, and
Provided further that the UCB has taken advantages of this provision in respect of
each of such advances (please refer to paragraphs 23 and 24);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the co-operative societies act of the state concerned contains an obligatory provision for deduction of periodical loan instalments by the employer ou

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board approved policy, which shall, inter- alia, include the following provisions, with the details outlined in the ensui
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy, which shall, inter-
alia, include the following provisions, with the details outlined in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board approved policy, which shall, inter- alia, include the following provisions, with the details outlined in the ensui

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed before the board
controls.control_description:
(3) The Periodic review of the small value loan portfolio behaviour and quality under
different loan-size categories, shall be placed before the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed before the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix, with the approval of its board of directors, exposure ceiling in relation to its tier-i capital
controls.control_description:
The UCB shall fix, with the approval of its Board of Directors, exposure ceiling in relation
to its Tier-I capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix, with the approval of its board of directors, exposure ceiling in relation to its tier-i capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise both credit exposure (loans and advances) and investment exposure (non-slr securities) as detailed at paragraphs 4(1) and 4(2) respectively
controls.control_description:
The exposure for the purpose shall comprise both credit exposure (loans
and advances) and investment exposure (Non-SLR securities) as detailed at paragraphs
4(1) and 4(2) respectively, so that -
(1) the exposure to an individual borrower does not exceed 15 per cent of Tier-I capital;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise both credit exposure (loans and advances) and investment exposure (non-slr securities) as detailed at paragraphs 4(1) and 4(2) respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included while computing the aggregate exposure of a ucb to individual / group borrowers for deciding the above prudential exposure limits
controls.control_description:
Note: A UCB's contribution towards eligible funds with NABARD, NHB, SIDBI, MUDRA
Ltd., or any other entity specified by RBI, on account of shortfall in priority sector
lending (PSL) targets shall not be included while computing the aggregate exposure
of a UCB to individual / group borrowers for deciding the above prudential exposure
limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included while computing the aggregate exposure of a ucb to individual / group borrowers for deciding the above prudential exposure limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted every year after the finalisation and audit of balance sheet of the ucb and the exposure ceilings may be advised to the loan sanctioning
controls.control_description:
The exercise of computing the exposure ceilings shall be conducted every year after
the finalisation and audit of balance sheet of the UCB and the exposure ceilings may be
advised to the loan sanctioning authorities and the investment department in the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted every year after the finalisation and audit of balance sheet of the ucb and the exposure ceilings may be advised to the loan sanctioning

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for determining exposure ceiling at half-yearly intervals, with the approval of its board
controls.control_description:
In
view of the linking of shareholding to lending, accretion to or reduction in the share capital
after the balance sheet date shall be taken into account for determining exposure ceiling at
half-yearly intervals, with the approval of its Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for determining exposure ceiling at half-yearly intervals, with the approval of its board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for reckoning the exposure ceiling
controls.control_description:
However, accretion to capital funds other than to share capital, such as half-
yearly profit etc., shall not be eligible for reckoning the exposure ceiling.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for reckoning the exposure ceiling

controls.control_objective: To ensure take exposures in excess of ceiling prescribed in anticipation of infusion of capital on a future date
controls.control_description:
The UCB shall not
take exposures in excess of ceiling prescribed in anticipation of infusion of capital on a
future date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take exposures in excess of ceiling prescribed in anticipation of infusion of capital on a future date

controls.control_objective: To ensure have at least 50 per cent of its aggregate loans and advances comprising of small value loans, i.e., loans of value not more than ₹25 lakh or 0.4 per cent of its tier- i capital, whichever is higher
controls.control_description:
The UCB shall have at least 50 per cent of its aggregate loans and advances comprising
of Small Value Loans, i.e., loans of value not more than ₹25 lakh or 0.4 per cent of its Tier-
I capital, whichever is higher, subject to a ceiling of ₹3 crore per borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have at least 50 per cent of its aggregate loans and advances comprising of small value loans, i.e., loans of value not more than ₹25 lakh or 0.4 per cent of its tier- i capital, whichever is higher

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically review the portfolio behaviour and quality under different loan-size categories and where necessary, may consider fixing lower ceilings
controls.control_description:
The Board of
the UCB, however, shall periodically review the portfolio behaviour and quality under
different loan-size categories and where necessary, may consider fixing lower ceilings..
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically review the portfolio behaviour and quality under different loan-size categories and where necessary, may consider fixing lower ceilings

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the exposure limits stipulated at paragraph 6 above
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the above, the UCB shall adhere to the exposure limits stipulated at
paragraph 6 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the exposure limits stipulated at paragraph 6 above

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all types of funded and non-funded exposures in the nature of credit
controls.control_description:
'Loans' for the purpose shall include all types of funded and non-funded
exposures in the nature of credit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include all types of funded and non-funded exposures in the nature of credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in conformity with the above requirements as per following glide path: march 31, march 31, target date → minimum percentage of small value 40 per 5
controls.control_description:
The UCB which does not, at present, comply with the
prescribed threshold shall be in conformity with the above requirements as per following
glide path:
March 31,
March 31,
Target Date →
Minimum percentage of Small Value
40 per
50 per
Loans in aggregate loans and advances →
cent
cent
E.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in conformity with the above requirements as per following glide path: march 31, march 31, target date → minimum percentage of small value 40 per 5

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame, with the approval of its board of directors, comprehensive prudential norms relating to the ceiling on the total amount of real estate loans, k
controls.control_description:
The UCB shall frame, with the approval of its Board of Directors, comprehensive
prudential norms relating to the ceiling on the total amount of real estate loans, keeping in
view the RBI guidelines to ensure that the UCB credit is used for construction activity and
<image>
not for activity connected with speculation in real estate subject to the instructions in
following paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to frame, with the approval of its board of directors, comprehensive prudential norms relating to the ceiling on the total amount of real estate loans, k

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 25 per cent of its total loans and advances as on march 31 of previous financial year
controls.control_description:
Aggregate exposure of a UCB to residential mortgages (housing loans to individuals),
other than those eligible to be classified as priority sector, shall not exceed 25 per cent of
its total loans and advances as on March 31 of previous financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 25 per cent of its total loans and advances as on march 31 of previous financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed five per cent of its total loans and advances as on march 31 of previous financial year
controls.control_description:
Aggregate exposure of a UCB to real estate sector, excluding housing loans to
individuals, shall not exceed five per cent of its total loans and advances as on March 31
of previous financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed five per cent of its total loans and advances as on march 31 of previous financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available:
controls.control_description:
With a view to smoothening the transition of UCBs, which were in the breach of the new
exposure limit to 'real estate sector, excluding housing loans to individuals' at '5% of
total loans and advances' while being in compliance with the older aggregate exposure
limit to housing, real estate and commercial real estate loans at '10 per cent of total
assets' as on February 24, 2025, the following dispensations shall be available:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disbursed/run- off till maturity as per the originally sanctioned terms and conditions / repayment
controls.control_description:
(i) Term loans and non-fund-based facilities to real estate sector (excluding housing
loans to individuals), sanctioned on or before February 24, 2025, may be disbursed/run-
off till maturity as per the originally sanctioned terms and conditions / repayment
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disbursed/run- off till maturity as per the originally sanctioned terms and conditions / repayment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to be utilized
controls.control_description:
(ii) Limits on cash credit or revolving facilities of similar nature sanctioned to real estate
sector on or before February 24, 2025, may be allowed to be utilized.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to be utilized

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rationalized with a view to meeting the aggregate exposure limit in a time bound manner in consultation with the borrower
controls.control_description:
However, such
limits may be rationalized with a view to meeting the aggregate exposure limit in a time
bound manner in consultation with the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be rationalized with a view to meeting the aggregate exposure limit in a time bound manner in consultation with the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure take any fresh exposures to real estate sector (excluding housing loans to individuals) till they have adequate headroom available according to the pr
controls.control_description:
(iii) Such UCBs shall not take any fresh exposures to real estate sector (excluding
housing loans to individuals) till they have adequate headroom available according to
the prudential limits prescribed in Section E.1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take any fresh exposures to real estate sector (excluding housing loans to individuals) till they have adequate headroom available according to the pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by provisions contained in reserve bank of india (urban co- operative banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfoli
controls.control_description:
The UCB shall be guided by provisions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-
operative Banks - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio)
Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by provisions contained in reserve bank of india (urban co- operative banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfoli

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by provisions contained in reserve bank of india (urban co- operative banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfoli
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall be guided by provisions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-
operative Banks - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio)
Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by provisions contained in reserve bank of india (urban co- operative banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfoli

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
The limits for individual borrower and group borrower on unsecured advances (with or
without surety) shall be governed by Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks -
Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 per cent of its total assets as per the audited balance-sheet as on march 31 of the preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
The total unsecured loans and advances (with surety or without surety or for cheque
purchase) granted by a UCB to its members should not exceed 10 per cent of its total
assets as per the audited balance-sheet as on March 31 of the preceding financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 per cent of its total assets as per the audited balance-sheet as on march 31 of the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure finance a borrower, who is already enjoying credit facilities with another bank, without obtaining a 'noc' from such financing bank and where the aggr
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall not finance a borrower, who is already enjoying credit facilities with another
bank, without obtaining a 'NOC' from such financing bank and where the aggregate of the
credit facilities enjoyed by the borrower exceeds the ceiling stipulated at para 18 above,
the prior approval of RBI shall be obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to finance a borrower, who is already enjoying credit facilities with another bank, without obtaining a 'noc' from such financing bank and where the aggr

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed ₹40,000
controls.control_description:
In order to provide further impetus to UCBs engaged in financial inclusion, it has been
decided that for a UCB whose priority sector loan portfolio is not less than 90 per cent of
the gross loans may, with the prior approval of the RBI, grant unsecured advances to the
extent of 35 per cent of its total assets as per the audited balance sheet at the end of the
preceding financial year, subject to the following conditions:
<image>
(1) The entire unsecured loan portfolio in excess of the normally permitted 10 per cent,
shall comprise of priority sector loans and the exposure to any individual borrower
shall not exceed ₹40,000.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed ₹40,000

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempt from the aggregate ceiling on unsecured exposure of 10 per cent of total assets as per audited balance sheet as on march 31 of the previous financial year
controls.control_description:
In respect of the UCB whose priority sector lending portfolio is less than 90 per cent,
unsecured loans up to ₹10,000 sanctioned by the UCB shall be exempt from the aggregate
ceiling on unsecured exposure of 10 per cent of total assets as per audited balance sheet
as on March 31 of the previous financial year, subject to following conditions:
(1) The individual amount sanctioned should not exceed ₹10,000.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempt from the aggregate ceiling on unsecured exposure of 10 per cent of total assets as per audited balance sheet as on march 31 of the previous financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for productive purpose and the ucb should ensure end use of funds lent
controls.control_description:
(2) The loan should be for productive purpose and the UCB should ensure end use of
funds lent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be for productive purpose and the ucb should ensure end use of funds lent

controls.control_objective: To ensure have crar of at least nine per cent
controls.control_description: (3) The UCB should have CRAR of at least nine per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have crar of at least nine per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than seven per cent
controls.control_description: (4) The Gross NPAs of the UCB should not be more than seven per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than seven per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 15 per cent of its total assets
controls.control_description:
(5) The unsecured loans so extended by the UCB shall not exceed 15 per cent of its
total assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 15 per cent of its total assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the latest inspection report and audited financial statements
controls.control_description:
Financial parameters detailed above shall be as per the latest
Inspection Report and audited financial statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be as per the latest inspection report and audited financial statements

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow such advances in excess of the limits, ranging from ₹0.25 lakh to ₹5 lakh
controls.control_description:
In view of the fact that salary earners' UCB grants advances to salaried employees of a
particular institution / group of institutions to which its membership is restricted and
deductions are made from the salaries through their employers, the salary earners' UCB
may allow such advances in excess of the limits, ranging from ₹0.25 lakh to ₹5 lakh, subject
to the following conditions:
(1) The Co-operative Societies Act of the State concerned contains an obligatory
provision for deduction of periodical loan instalments by the employer out of
employee's salaries / wages to meet bank's claims.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow such advances in excess of the limits, ranging from ₹0.25 lakh to ₹5 lakh

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as secured only for the purpose of computation of total unsecured advances to the members as a whole
controls.control_description:
The advances granted by a UCB, other than salary earners' societies, to all salaried
borrowers wherein repayment is sought to be ensured through deduction from borrower's
salaries as per the provisions of the State Co-operative Societies Act, should be reckoned
as secured only for the purpose of computation of total unsecured advances to the
members as a whole.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as secured only for the purpose of computation of total unsecured advances to the members as a whole

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that these advances do not exceed the maximum limit on unsecured advances as indicated in reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - cre
controls.control_description:
While granting advances to the individual salaried borrowers, the
UCB should ensure that these advances do not exceed the maximum limit on unsecured
advances as indicated in Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit
Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that these advances do not exceed the maximum limit on unsecured advances as indicated in reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - cre

controls.control_objective: To ensure sanction loans to nominal members for short / temporary period and for purchase of consumer durables
controls.control_description:
UCBs may sanction loans to nominal members for short / temporary period and for
purchase of consumer durables, subject to the following ceiling:
UCBs Ceiling of Loan Amount
i) With Deposits up to ₹ 50 crore ₹ 50,000 per borrower
ii) With Deposits above ₹ 50 crore ₹ 1,00,000 per borrower
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sanction loans to nominal members for short / temporary period and for purchase of consumer durables

controls.control_objective: To ensure not, at any point of time, exceed 20% of the regular members
controls.control_description:
The total number of nominal members should not, at any point of time, exceed 20% of
the regular members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to not, at any point of time, exceed 20% of the regular members

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded for the purpose of computation of the above ceiling
controls.control_description:
However, non-borrower sureties and coparceners who are admitted
as nominal members should be excluded for the purpose of computation of the above
ceiling.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded for the purpose of computation of the above ceiling

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to
the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those
directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
